summary.why: Generated reports should present finished, evidence-backed artifacts rather than expose model selection or drafting analysis.
summary.how: Added an enforced silent-selection contract to every built-in template, tightened decision-digest evidence and trade-off rules, and edited the published digest for directness.

notes: Reviewed all eight built-ins and their published examples. The visible scratchpad came from a stale main-worktree preview; no second published leak was found. Kept narrative in devblog because it is the artifact's intent, while forbidding meta-process in every template.
